name: TBA — Keynote Speaker
topic: NIS2 and the Energy Sector: From Directive to Reality
bio: Leading European cybersecurity policy expert specialising in critical infrastructure resilience and cross-border incident coordination.

name: Tim Conway
bio: Technical Director of ICS and SCADA programs at SANS Institute. Author of ICS515, ICS612 and other core ICS curriculum. Two decades of hands-on experience protecting industrial control systems across energy, utilities and manufacturing.

name: TBA — SANS Faculty
topic: ICS515: Visibility and Detection in OT Environments
bio: SANS ICS curriculum lead with 15+ years of hands-on experience in industrial control system security assessments and incident response.

name: TBA — Industry Expert
topic: Real-World Attack on a European Power Grid: Lessons Learned
bio: Seasoned practitioner who led the response to a major grid cyber incident. Brings unfiltered operational perspective to threat modelling and resilience.
